ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the game */,
  "game_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the play was made in */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter the play was made in */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., run, pass) */,
  "time_remaining" TEXT /* Time remaining in the quarter when the play was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the play */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., field goal, touchdown) */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points scored on the play */,
  "play_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the play within the game */,
  "down" INTEGER /* The down number (1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th) */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance needed for a first down */,
  "yard_line" INTEGER /* Yard line where the play started */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., touchdown, incomplete pass) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the play */,
  "play_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the play record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the play record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team is based in */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the team is based in */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach */,
  "team_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is on */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "player_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic is for */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic is for */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., field goal, touchdown) */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points scored */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Yards gained during the play */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists (e.g., blocks, tackles) */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties */,
  "stat_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is on */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of refereeing experience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the referee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the referee record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the permission is for */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
